justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions, including "Tuesday of next week at 15h" and "Wednesday of next week, around 11 AM."
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent successfully found an alternative time after two rejections, offering appropriate options each time.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently processed all user requests without asking for redundant information or making unnecessary turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent maintaining a helpful and polite tone throughout.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered gracefully after initial unavailability, suggesting alternative times and days without losing context.
